info.name: Object Store Read Cache
info.summary: Read-through cache and retry wrapper for the S3 primary object store
info.description:
Decorates the built-in S3 primary object-storage backend with:
- a distributed (Redis) read-through cache for small objects — note bodies and per-file encryption keys — so repeated reads are served without hitting the object store; and - transient-failure retries with exponential backoff around reads, to tolerate a throttling object store (e.g. Hetzner "503 Slow Down").
The decorator class is wired in via `config.php` (`objectstore` → `class`). It does not need to be enabled as an app when loaded via a `*.config.php` require (see the project README), which also means a disabled app can never break file access.
Because the cache sits below the encryption layer, it only ever holds the same encrypted-at-rest bytes the object store already stores.
info.author: CVan
